# ghc-tcplugins-extra


```{.pre filename=examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/package.dhall include=../examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/package.dhall start-line=1 end-line=48 code-line-numbers="true"}
```

```{.pre filename=examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/defaults.dhall include=../examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/defaults.dhall start-line=1 end-line=48 code-line-numbers="true"}
```

```{.pre filename=examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/version.dhall include=../examples/ghc-tcplugins-extra/version.dhall start-line=1 end-line=48 code-line-numbers="true"}
```
